title: Context, Cancellation, Backpressure, Structured Concurrency, and Leaks · Execution Trace: Cancel Deadline Cause
summary: A request launches several operations; one fails, one blocks, one outlives the caller, and overload grows without bound. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go cancel deadline cause increment in a cancelable bounded worker group. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive, propagate, call, and observe cancellation, deadlines, timeouts, and causes while releasing timer resources.
Pass context as the first operation parameter across call boundaries and avoid storing it as durable domain state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
